title: Add News & Views category section to homepage bottom sections

requirements.text: Add a 'News & Views' category section to the homepage bottom sections so that all four categories — Startups & Funding, News & Views, Interviews, and Market Trends — are displayed. The News & Views section must follow the same layout and styling as the other three category sections (section header with 'More' link, article cards with thumbnail, category tag, headline, and date).

quotes: Why was the news and views section not listed on the bottom section?
Ensure 'News & Views' category section appears in the homepage bottom sections alongside Startups & Funding, Interviews, and Market Trends.

acceptanceCriteria: The homepage displays four category sections at the bottom: Startups & Funding, News & Views, Interviews, and Market Trends.
The News & Views section renders published articles tagged with the 'News & Views' category.
The News & Views section includes a 'More' link that navigates to the News & Views category page.
The News & Views section matches the visual layout and styling of the other three category sections on the homepage.
If no published articles exist for News & Views, the section still appears with an appropriate empty or placeholder state consistent with the other sections.

constraints: Do not alter the layout or content of the other three existing category sections (Startups & Funding, Interviews, Market Trends).
Use the existing Category enum value and slug for 'News & Views' as defined in frontend/src/lib/utils.ts.
nonGoals: Adding new backend fields or modifying the data model.
Changing the category simplification already implemented in the backend.
Modifying the Navbar or Footer category links.
